docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY COURTNEY STEVE D SOUZA ALAN AS TO DEFENDANT HELGESON LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
